---
title: "Fase 2 - Ensayo RBK"
number-sections: false

lang: es
bibliography: ../ONT-PGT.bib
csl: ../nature.csl
---

::: callout-note
## Links
**Insumos**: [Libreria RBK](https://store.nanoporetech.com/rapid-barcoding-sequencing-kit-24-v14.html). 
[Starter kit MinION Mk1D](https://store.nanoporetech.com/minion.html).
[Reporte-Run1](/inputs/Nico_info/rbk_results/report_FBF54235_20260411_1438_6214133c.html). [Reporte-Run2](/inputs/Nico_info/rbk_results/report_FBF54235_20260411_1800_f9fc89ce.html). [Reporte-Run3](/inputs/Nico_info/rbk_results/report_FBF54235_20260416_0916_95c7d263.html).

**Delivery 4**:  [Apéndice económico](../appendix-economico/costsRBKRAA.qmd).
:::




## 1. Ensayo RBK

En abril 2026 el servicio de genómica ONE BIOME secuenció muestras de ADN tomadas del freezer de Reprofert:

1.  Las muestras consistieron en **23 ADN congelados** (-20ºC),
    extraídos de biopsias embrionarias previamente amplificadas con
    Sureplex, derivadas de estudios de PGT-A realizados en Biocódices SA, durante los años
    2017 al 2019, utilizando secuenciación Illumina y librerías y software de Yikon Genomics [^1].

2.  La secuenciación se llevó a cabo en un equipo **MinION Mk1B**, con un flow cell **FLO-MIN114**.
    
3.  Se realizaron 3 corridas los dias 11 y 16 de abril 

  - **Run 1**. 5 muestras (BCD01-BCD05) con un runtime de 2.0 hs  
  - **Run 2**. 8 muestras (BCD08-BCD013)con un runtime de 4 hs, 47 min
  - **Run 3**. 10 muestras (BCD14-BCD023) con un runtime de 6 hs, 12 min
  
[^1]: Con excepción de las muestras CG[2,3,5,6,8] que  provienen de un solo caso de PGT-SR realizado en Cooper Genomics con tecnología genómica y bioinformática Illumina.

La Tabla 1 muestra los códigos y resultados de cada una de estas corridas.


```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(tibble)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)


link_bc <- function(x) {
  ifelse(
    is.na(x) | x == "",
    "",
    ifelse(
      x == "-",
      "-",
      paste0(
        '<a href="/inputs/Nico_info/rbk_results/barcode',
        stringr::str_extract(x, "\\d+"),
        '_CNV_calling_results.html" target="_blank">',
        x,
        '</a>'
      )
    )
  )
}

tabla_barcodes <- tribble(
  ~Etiqueta, ~Diagnóstico, ~`Run 1`, ~`Run 2`, ~`Run 3`,
  "AC1",  "XX, +9, +16, +21", "-",    "",     "BC14",
  "CB5",  "XX, -5, +12, +20", "BC01", "",     "",
  "CB7",  "XY, -2, +18, -19", "BC02", "",     "",
  "CB9",  "XY", "-", "BC06", "",
  "CG2",  "XY, +11(q23.3-qter), -22(q11.2-qter)", "", "BC07", "BC15",
  "CG3",  "XX, -9p(mos), -11(q24.1-qter)(mos)", "", "", "BC16",
  "CG6",  "XY, +11(q23.3-qter), -13, -16, -22(q11.2-qter)", "", "", "",
  "CG5",  "XX, +11(q23.3-qter), -22(q11.2-qter)", "BC03", "BC08", "BC17",
  "CG8",  "XY, +11(q23.3-qter), -22(q11.2-qter)", "", "", "BC18",
  "CH2",  "XY, -3(p25.3-pter)(mos)", "", "", "",
  "CH3",  "XXY, +8(p22-pter)", "BC04", "", "",
  "CH7",  "XX, +4(q26-qter)(mos)", "", "BC09", "BC19",
  "CH8",  "XY", "", "", "",
  "D2",   "XX", "", "BC10", "",
  "D3",   "XY", "", "", "",
  "D4",   "XXY", "", "BC11", "",
  "D6",   "XX", "", "", "",
  "D7",   "XX", "", "", "",
  "DS1",  "XX", "", "", "",
  "DS3",  "X -2, +9, +11, -19", "", "BC12", "BC20",
  "DS4",  "XY, -19, +22", "", "", "BC21",
  "DS5",  "XX -8(q21.13-24.12), -19", "", "", "BC22",
  "GP10", "XY, -21, +22", "BC05", "BC13", "BC23"
) %>%
  mutate(across(starts_with("Run"), link_bc))

library(kableExtra)

kable(
  tabla_barcodes,
  caption = "Tabla 1: Muestras, formulación genómica de referencia y resultados.",
  escape = FALSE,
  align = c("l", "l", "c", "c", "c"),
  format = "html"
) %>%
  kable_styling(
    full_width = FALSE,
    position = "center",
    font_size = 13
  ) %>%
  column_spec(1, width = "7em") %>%
  column_spec(2, width = "25em") %>%
  column_spec(3:5, width = "5em")

```
